description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_and_test that can be called by other workflows. It should have a multi-job build and test process with different environments. For Ubuntu 20.04 and 22.04, use specific 4-core runners, checkout code, prepare Debian, and then setup build and test with Make. For a Windows environment, use the latest Windows runner, checkout code, and then setup build and test for Windows. Additionally, test with Clang from llvm.org for various versions on Ubuntu 22.04.
